title: saxifraga aizoon subsp. neogaea
intro: Saxifraga aizoon subsp. neogaea is a plant species that belongs to the Saxifraga genus, a group of flowering plants commonly known as saxifrages or rock saxifrages. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Saxifraga aizoon subsp. neogaea include the potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Saxifraga aizoon subsp. neogaea is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
